slideTitle: Rules: Towards or Away from Normal?

assetDebugEntries.resolvedAltText: It is disappointing when items have no use. A card with a shiny reflective surface that appears multicoloured as a result of light being refracted on the surface was included in the packaging of a item I recently purchased. This card had no apparent purpose. It was not visible while the package was sealed and was not useable with the item in the package. I do like shiny things and decide that I should keep the card and find a purpose for it. There is a rule in photography that states, if it is red, shoot it. I believe, if it is shiny shoot it. However, the card alone is not very interesting. Ah! I know! Put some water drops on it! As a result of putting water on the card, it has become warped and wrinkled. The shiny covering has peeled from the paper backing. The card is now ruined. I feel a bit better though, that I made creative use of the card before discarding it.
